title: Memories
description: Memories is an emotional R&B sample pack built around warm Rhodes chords, nostalgic melodies, soft pads, plucks, and bass layers. Designed for producers making late-night R&B, trap soul, melodic hip-hop, and emotional records.
shortDescription: Emotional R&B loops with Rhodes, pads, plucks, bass layers, and full melodic ideas.
detailsCopy: Built for producers who want finished melodic starters without relying on drum loops or one-shots. Each idea includes a full loop plus separated musical layers so you can arrange, chop, pitch, or rebuild the idea your own way.
